nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux was born in 1314, in Scotland, United Kingdom. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton. She died in 1386, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vauxは1314年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた。彼女はWilliam de Vaux - Lord of Direltonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1386年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで72歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux(은)는 1314년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux родилась в 1314 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton. Она умерла в 1386 г. в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.
